languages.text: {n}Вы отворачиваетесь и уходите прочь, слыша за спиной стоны боли и причитания молодого хирургеона, пытающегося сделать хоть что-то — но безрезультатно.{/n}
{n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы отворачиваетесь и уходите прочь, слыша за спиной стоны боли и причитания молодого хирургеона, пытающегося сделать хоть что-то — но безрезультатно.{/n}

{n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}
{n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは踵を返して歩き去る。背後から、苦痛のうめきと、どうにかしようとしても為すすべのない若い外科医の嘆きが聞こえてくる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}

traits.locale_text: あなたは踵を返して歩き去る。背後から、苦痛のうめきと、どうにかしようとしても為すすべのない若い外科医の嘆きが聞こえてくる。

languages.text: {n}Vous tournez les talons et vous éloignez, en entendant derrière vous des gémissements de douleur et les lamentations du jeune chirurgeon qui essaie en vain de sauver son patient.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous tournez les talons et vous éloignez, en entendant derrière vous des gémissements de douleur et les lamentations du jeune chirurgeon qui essaie en vain de sauver son patient.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Arkanı dönüp uzaklaşıyorsun. Arkandan acı dolu inlemeler ve bir şeyler yapmaya çalışan ama nafile çabalayan genç cerrahın feryatları işitiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Arkanı dönüp uzaklaşıyorsun. Arkandan acı dolu inlemeler ve bir şeyler yapmaya çalışan ama nafile çabalayan genç cerrahın feryatları işitiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du wendest dich ab und hörst beim Gehen das Stöhnen des Patienten und das Jammern des jungen Chirurgen, der vergeblich versucht, ihm zu helfen. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du wendest dich ab und hörst beim Gehen das Stöhnen des Patienten und das Jammern des jungen Chirurgen, der vergeblich versucht, ihm zu helfen. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Das media vuelta y te alejas, dejando atrás los gemidos de dolor y los lamentos del joven cirujano cuyos esfuerzos son en vano. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You turn and walk away, hearing behind you the groans of pain and the lamentations of the young chirurgeon trying to do something, but to no avail. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das media vuelta y te alejas, dejando atrás los gemidos de dolor y los lamentos del joven cirujano cuyos esfuerzos son en vano. {/n}

languages.text: {n}你转身离开，身后传来痛苦的呻吟，以及那位年轻船医虽奋力施救却无力回天的悲叹。{/n}
